skill.name: learn
skill.description: Discover, install, and manage AI agent skills from agentskill.sh. Search for capabilities, install mid-session, scan for security issues, and provide feedback. Use when asked to find skills, install extensions, or check skill safety.
skill.summary: Discover, install, and manage AI agent skills from agentskill.sh. Search for capabilities, install m...
skill.author: agentskill-sh

security_audit.summary: Static analysis flagged 677 potential issues, but evaluation reveals these are false positives. The skill is a legitimate AI skill marketplace that searches, installs, and manages skills from agentskill.sh. The flagged patterns in references/SECURITY.md are educational examples of security patterns to scan for, not actual vulnerabilities. Network access is required for API calls to agentskill.sh. External command references are recommendations for security scanning tools, not executions. No prompt injection attempts detected.

high_findings.title: Network Access for Skill Discovery
high_findings.description: Skill makes network requests to agentskill.sh API for fetching skill listings and installing skills. This is legitimate functionality for a skill marketplace.
high_findings.confidence_reasoning: Direct API call to agentskill.sh for skill search - core marketplace functionality

medium_findings.title: External Command References in Documentation
medium_findings.description: SKILL.md references security scanning tools (trufflehog, gitleaks, mcp-scan) as recommendations for the security scanning feature. These are not executed, just documented as options.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: Documentation of security tool options, not actual command execution

content.user_title: Find and Install AI Agent Skills
content.value_statement: This skill enables Claude to discover, install, and manage AI agent skills from the agentskill.sh marketplace, turning your agent into a self-improving system.
actual_capabilities: Search for AI agent skills by keyword or capability
Install skills mid-session from agentskill.sh marketplace
Scan skills for security issues before installation
List, update, and remove installed skills
Provide context-aware skill recommendations based on project
Submit feedback and ratings for installed skills
limitations: Requires internet connection to access agentskill.sh API
Only supports skills from agentskill.sh marketplace
Security scanning relies on pattern detection and may miss novel attacks
Cannot install skills that fail security scan (score below 70)

use_cases.title: Discover New Capabilities
use_cases.description: When you need a capability that Claude doesn't currently have, use /learn to search for relevant skills in the marketplace.
use_cases.target_user: Users who need to extend Claude's capabilities

use_cases.title: Install Skills Mid-Session
use_cases.description: While working on a task, discover you need a specific skill? Install it instantly without leaving your workflow.

use_cases.title: Security-Aware Installation
use_cases.description: Every skill is security-scanned before install. Block dangerous skills automatically and review warnings for risky ones.

prompt_templates.title: Search for Skills
prompt_templates.prompt: Find skills for working with databases
prompt_templates.scenario: When you need a specific capability

prompt_templates.title: Install Specific Skill
prompt_templates.scenario: When you know the exact skill you want

prompt_templates.title: Get Recommendations
prompt_templates.prompt: What skills do you recommend for my project?

prompt_templates.title: Check for Updates
prompt_templates.prompt: Check if my installed skills have updates

output_examples.input: Find skills for working with APIs

output: What this skill does: Provides HTTP client capabilities...

best_practices: Review security scores before installing any skill
Only install skills from trusted authors
Keep installed skills updated using /learn update
Use /learn scan to audit skills before installation
anti_patterns: Installing skills with security scores below 70
Installing skills without reviewing their capabilities first
Skipping updates that include security fixes

faq.question: Is this skill safe to use?
faq.answer: Yes. This is the official skill marketplace for agentskill.sh. All skills are security-scanned before installation.

faq.question: What do the security scores mean?
faq.answer: Scores 90-100 are safe, 70-89 require review, below 70 are blocked. The score is based on pattern detection for common security risks.

faq.question: Can I install skills from other sources?
faq.answer: Currently this skill only supports the agentskill.sh marketplace. Other sources may be added in future versions.

faq.question: How do I know if a skill is trustworthy?
faq.answer: Check the security score, review the author reputation, read the skill description, and use /learn scan to audit before installing.

faq.question: What happens if a skill is blocked?
faq.answer: Skills scoring below 70 are blocked for safety. You cannot install them unless the author fixes the security issues.

faq.question: Can I provide feedback on skills?
faq.answer: Yes, use /learn feedback <slug> <score> [comment] to rate skills after using them. Your feedback helps other agents find better skills.
